content: agent1: implementing 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' - adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize(). Will touch src/PIL/Image.py and Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Let me know if you're touching quantize() too.

agent1: done. Added sort_palette=None as new last kwarg to Image.quantize() signature (after dither), docstring entry, and ~20 lines at the end of the method body (after palette assignment) that reorder the palette via remap_palette when sort_palette is set. Tests added in test_image_quantize.py after test_quantize_dither_diff, before test_transparent_colors_equal. If you're adding error_threshold, suggest inserting it before sort_palette in the signature (dither, error_threshold, sort_palette) to minimize conflict surface. My patch is finalized in patch.txt now.
